subject: Re:
body:
call 212 772  9416

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Sunday, September 9, 2007 2:29:53 PM
Subject: 


Hi Mr. Epstein,

Wanted to say hi and tell you how much I miss your business advice as I 
embark in my venture in the coming weeks.  So far so good.

I have to say I am completely surprised and disappointed that you and GM 
turned on me when all I did was raise my concern about what was going on and 
asked to speak about it.  I've been nothing but upfront and honest with you 
both about everything.   Knowing my weak finances, I counted on my remaining 
income to cover my expenses most especially over the next few months (i no 
longer have that) and yet still disregarded me the way you did.  Loyal, 
honest and eternally thankful I've been.  What can I say, I'm sadened by the 
actions.

I do have a few last receipts to turn into Bella for expenses and will do 
this week.  I haven't heard from either of you so I assume everything is ok. 
  But then again, ever since GM deletd my phone it has gone awry and rarely 
working so I replaced it lastweek.  I'm up and running now....another 
unexpected expense.

I do hope your days lately have been wondrful for you.

Best,
cd
